jsonLd.title: Fyers is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
